headline: 2 Reasons to Like TRV (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Travelers currently trades at $294.96 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 2.7%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 9.9% gain during that period.
